title: Lumen: Daily Habit Streaks
subtitle: Plan tomorrow, wake up ready
keywords: routine,focus timer,morning ritual,self care,discipline,journal,goal setting,quiet mind,productivity
shortDescription: Build daily habits with streaks, smart reminders and a calm morning plan.
description:
Keep your habits alive with streaks you can see grow.

Plan tomorrow the night before, check off each ritual as you go, and let smart reminders nudge you at the moment you usually follow through. Rated 4.8 by 3,200 early users.

Every completed morning extends your chain. Miss a day and Lumen helps you restart gently instead of guilting you.

Download free and start your first streak tonight.
whatItDoes: Track daily habits, build streaks and plan calm mornings with smart reminders.
